column1: Dataset Title: Russian Arctic Vegetation Archive: Wrangel island Vegetation Plots (Association Oxytropidi wrangelii-Diyadetum integrifoliae)
Dataset Reference: Kholod S.S. 2007. Classification of the Wrangel Island // Vegetation of Russia, 11: 3-135
Dataset Table: Species Cover Data for Vegetation Plots of  Wrangel island (Association Oxytropidi wrangelii-Diyadetum integrifoliae)

Dataset Notes: Species cover classes are the new Braun-Blanquet cover-abundance scale. Taxa are listed in alphabetical order. Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
